subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath drawn the servants through the utterance of his Lord, the Most Merciful, and hath spoken before all faces that which He hath spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اجتذب العباد ببیان ربه الرحمن و نطق امام الوجوه بما نطق به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God
